serverInfo.name: primus-digital-info
serverInfo.title: Primus Digital — Agency Info
serverInfo.description: Read-only MCP server for Primus Digital, a digital marketing agency in Zagazig, Sharqia, Egypt. Exposes the agency's packages and EGP pricing, service catalog, contact channels, and a WhatsApp inquiry-link builder.

tools.name: get_packages
tools.description: List marketing packages with monthly EGP pricing.

tools.name: get_services
tools.description: List core and exclusive services plus areas served.

tools.name: get_contact_options
tools.description: Get WhatsApp, email, and social contact channels.

tools.name: get_inquiry_link
tools.description: Build a prefilled WhatsApp link for the free page-audit flow.
